creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

we are having a problem with the tinderbox. 
math/saga depends on graphics/gdal, which depends on 	devel/doxygen 
devel/doxygen won't compile in my tinderbox.
